info.title: specgen
info.description: AI-powered functional specification generator for Microsoft Dataverse solutions. Parses plugins, workflows, custom APIs, and more to produce structured Markdown documentation.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: specgen — Generate functional specifications from Dataverse solution components using AI.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan solution components and display parsed results (no AI calls).

commands.name: generate
commands.description:
Generate functional specification documents using AI.

Environment variables:
  OPENAI_API_KEY     OpenAI / Azure OpenAI API key
  OPENAI_ENDPOINT      Azure OpenAI endpoint URL
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY   Anthropic API key

commands.name: config
commands.description:
Manage specgen configuration.

Config file: ~/.specgen/config.json
Supported keys: api-key, model, default-output, default-solution, openai-api-key, anthropic-api-key, azure-endpoint, default-provider
